description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a widescreen display, encased in a matte black frame. The front features a large, rectangular screen displaying lines of code, bordered by a slim bezel with a subtle brand logo at the bottom center. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, angular pedestal stand with a broad, flat base, providing stability. The rear of the monitor is plain and unadorned, with a slight horizontal indentation but no visible ports or buttons. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile and the stand's geometric design, emphasizing its modern, minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with a glass or acrylic screen, and the surface finish is smooth and sleek.
description: A modern, widescreen computer monitor with a slim black bezel, flat display, and a sturdy angular pedestal stand. The front features a visible brand logo and a screen displaying code.
description_view_0: Front view showing the widescreen display, slim black bezel, and a brand logo at the bottom center.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the angular pedestal stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with a slight horizontal indentation and no visible ports or buttons.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the thinness of the monitor and the geometric design of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, matte black, with straight edges and slightly rounded corners, providing a modern and minimalistic frame around the display area.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a pedestal type with a broad, angular base and a central support column, made of matte black plastic with a geometric, stable design and no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single button is visible on the lower right edge of the front bezel, separated from other controls.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is present at the center of the bottom bezel, rendered in white text for clear visibility.
